title: Voidscape
body:
[![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9c6d892aae8803c853477e877c445b2fba662e0_0.webp)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/o2JLl)

Voidscape is a space mod for Minecraft!

Voidscape adds new futuristic sci-fi features to minecraft! Go and explore the moon, or stay on earth and make your dog some fancy new armor! The world is yours to explore in Voidscape!

![A picture of a wolf wearing Cyborg Armor next to a Moon Rocket in the Moon Dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1da082fd7969b3df29eec8ce4b75fdcb9ac24e93_0.webp)
![picture of the moon dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5502db98f632f2f65ea9832341e3ea07792f8969_0.webp)
**THE MOD IS IN BETA, THIS IS NOT THE FINAL VERSION**
